title: [MTR] Shinkansen Infrastructure
description: Addon for Minecraft Transit Railway with bridges, tunnels, catenary cables and poles, embankments and more!
body:
This addon for Minecraft Transit Railway adds multiple **infrastructure elements** to MTR:
- Catenary cables for pantographs (with and without poles)
- Tunnels (single and double track)
- Bridges (concrete and metal)

To place them, use a brush on an existing rail and select the model you want in the list!

This pack is **very light** by design (not even half a megabyte). The textures are very small, and I've optimized it as much as possible so that using the equipment on your rails has no noticeable performance impact.

**[Check out my Shinkansen packs!](https://modrinth.com/collection/jzC7uozr)**

### Enjoy it!

![Standalone bridge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e0d7c3c501406d8f188b3d872781ef74df86aac.jpeg)

![Bridge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5177733147151afbcffd24682afdf2259a92fa89.jpeg)
